title: Realistic Mechanics - Vanilla+ Physics
description: Add immersive survival realism! Heavy items sink, rain extinguishes fires, and leaves cushion falls. ⚓🌧️🍃
body:
# Realistic Mechanics

## Overview

Have you ever wondered why a heavy iron anvil floats on water just like a wooden block? Or why an uncovered campfire stays perfectly lit during a massive thunderstorm? Realistic Mechanics is a Vanilla+ mod designed to fix these logical gaps and breathe life into your world. 

By introducing immersive, physics-based, and environmental interactions, this mod transforms the way you experience survival Minecraft. Every new feature has been carefully crafted to feel like it should have always been in the base game, offering intuitive solutions and dynamic reactions to the world around you. 🌟

## Physics and Environment

The world is no longer static. Elements now interact with each other in logical and visually satisfying ways.

**Heavy Items Sink**
Say goodbye to floating ores and armors. Dense blocks, heavy tools, and metallic items will now sink straight to the bottom of water and lava lakes. ⚓
![Heavy items sinking in water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/31cc7ba7744d13dc8941908a23b8fb6d7164f491.gif)

**Dynamic Weather Reactions**
You will need to build roofs for your outdoor campsites. When it starts raining, exposed campfires and candles will naturally sizzle and extinguish. 🌧️
![Rain extinguishing a campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/3dab6386969247599324cf4a37127a753bef7e6c.gif)

**Cushioning Falls**
Parkour just got a little more strategic. Landing on soft materials like any type of leaves or wool blocks will drastically cushion your fall, reducing the damage you take. 🍃

![Player taking less damage falling on leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/eca115d65468de0bf0742389512a65f83e635e17.gif)

**Extinguishing Snowballs**
Snowballs are finally useful in an emergency. Throw them at fire blocks, lit campfires, or burning entities (including your friends and pets) to instantly put out the flames! ❄️
![Using snowballs to extinguish burning cows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/4e558015c42bf038a6c65d6cfe1ecea2a81d1ae7.gif)

## Farming and Utility

Taking care of your crops and managing your resources is now more interactive and rewarding. 

**Fertile Rain**
Storms bring life. Crops that are exposed to the open sky have a significantly higher chance of experiencing growth spurts during rain or thunderstorms. ⛈️

![Crops growing faster in the rain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/3ff48f9e7cec94fef9e49fd0632027094a5a8dc5.gif)

**Splash Bottle Irrigation**
Need to water your crops quickly? Throwing a splash water bottle will instantly hydrate a large radius of farmland and provide a slight growth boost to the plants hit by the water. 💦
![Hydrating farmland with a splash potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/046983dbe700bd3a8539ac5f9d5af780bfe76033.gif)

**Natural Sponge Drying**
You no longer need to waste furnace fuel to dry your sponges. Simply place a wet sponge directly next to a heat source like a lit campfire, fire, or lava, and it will slowly dry out over time. 🔥
![Wet sponge drying next to a campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/3f9cb54169b17e379d9f1af621b43e321f0f3d35.gif)

**Cauldron Dye Washing**
Made a mistake while decorating? Right-click a water-filled cauldron while holding dyed wool, carpets, or beds to wash the dye completely off, returning the items to their pure white state. 🧽
![Washing dyed items in a cauldron](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6L8uHAlk/images/a695a51672415e2c82e3219bb6af4b8bbee1b506.gif)

## Configuration and Customization

We know that every player and server has different needs. That is why Realistic Mechanics is fully modular. 

Don't like a specific feature? You can easily toggle absolutely every single mechanic on or off using the built-in configuration menu. You have total control over your Vanilla+ experience! ⚙️

![The in game configuration menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9524bf452f0536574a6aa4dc19d3d692b8e44937.png)

> Note: For the configuration menu to work in-game, please ensure you have **Mod Menu** and **Cloth Config API** installed alongside this mod.
